name: topsec-waf-v3-2294-20238
description: OctoBus package for TopSec WAF v3.2294.20238 — IP blacklist management and URL block rules via RESTful API.

TopSec_WAF.TopSec_WAF/AddBlacklistIP.name: add-blacklist-ip
TopSec_WAF.TopSec_WAF/AddBlacklistIP.description: Add IP addresses to the TopSec WAF blacklist.

TopSec_WAF.TopSec_WAF/DeleteBlacklistIP.name: delete-blacklist-ip
TopSec_WAF.TopSec_WAF/DeleteBlacklistIP.description: Remove a blacklist group by name in TopSec WAF.

TopSec_WAF.TopSec_WAF/ListBlacklistIPs.name: list-blacklist-ips
TopSec_WAF.TopSec_WAF/ListBlacklistIPs.description: List IP blacklist entries from TopSec WAF.

TopSec_WAF.TopSec_WAF/AddUrlBlock.name: add-url-block
TopSec_WAF.TopSec_WAF/AddUrlBlock.description: Add a URL block rule (custom policy) in TopSec WAF.

TopSec_WAF.TopSec_WAF/DeleteUrlBlock.name: delete-url-block
TopSec_WAF.TopSec_WAF/DeleteUrlBlock.description: Remove a URL block rule by name in TopSec WAF.

TopSec_WAF.TopSec_WAF/ListUrlBlocks.name: list-url-blocks
TopSec_WAF.TopSec_WAF/ListUrlBlocks.description: List URL block rules from TopSec WAF.

TopSec_WAF.TopSec_WAF/SetUrlBlockStatus.name: set-url-block-status
TopSec_WAF.TopSec_WAF/SetUrlBlockStatus.description: Enable or disable a URL block rule in TopSec WAF.
